zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Foote於1579年1月10日之前出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親Robert Foote27歲，母親Joan Brooke25歲。她於1602年2月14日與John Hewes在英國艾可沙爾福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1639年11月30日在英國艾可沙爾福德，埋葬在英國艾可沙爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Foote于1579年1月10日之前出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲Robert Foote27岁，母亲Joan Brooke25岁。她于1602年2月14日与John Hewes在英国艾可沙爾福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1639年11月30日在英国艾可沙爾福德，埋葬在英国艾可沙爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Foote
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English fot ‘foot’ (Old English fōt), sometimes translated in medieval documents by Latin cum pede ‘with the foot’. Probably a nickname for someone with a deformity of the foot or with large feet.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English personal name Fot, from Old Norse Fótr, originally a nickname with the same sense as 1 above.
English: topographic name for someone who lived at the foot of a hill.

variants.name: Foot
meanings: North German: from Middle Low German vōt ‘foot’; probably a nickname for someone with some peculiarity or deformity of the foot.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Foote was born before 10 January 1579, in London, England, her father, Robert Foote, was 27 and her mother, Joan Brooke, was 25. She married John Hewes on 14 February 1602, in Shalford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 30 November 1639, in Shalford, Essex, England, and was buried in Shalford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Foote est née avant 10 janvier 1579, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Robert Foote, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Brooke, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Hewes le 14 février 1602, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 novembre 1639, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Foote vor 10. Januar 1579 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Foote 27 und ihre Mutter Joan Brooke 25. Sie hat am 14. November 1639 in Shalford, Essex, England und wurde in Shalford, Essex, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Foote(이)가 1579년 1월 10일 이전 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Foote(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Brooke(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1602년 2월 14일 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 John Hewes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 11월 30일 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Foote nasceu antes 10 de janeiro de 1579, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Foote, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Brooke, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hewes em 14 de fevereiro de 1602, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1639, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Foote родилась перед 10 январь 1579 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Foote было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Brooke, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hewes 14 февраля 1602 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 30 ноября 1639 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия.
